# Madison Funeral Home

Madison Funeral Home is a full-service funeral provider located in Madison, NY, offering compassionate end-of-life services including casket selection, floral arrangements, candles, and video tributes. The business operates across multiple locations and features a dedicated funeral team. Their website would need to reflect dignity, warmth, and trust, with key features like obituary listings and service information for grieving families.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Current Obituary Notices



We honor every life with dignity and grace. These notices are updated with care and intended as a place for remembrance, reflection, and support for grieving families in Madison, NY and the surrounding communities.









### Eleanor M. Whitfield


March 12, 1942 — November 5, 2024


A devoted teacher and gardener whose kindness touched generations of students and neighbors alike.

View Full Notice →







### Robert J. Callahan


August 24, 1956 — October 28, 2024


Beloved father, carpenter, and storyteller who built not just homes but lasting friendships.

View Full Notice →







### Margaret & Thomas Reed


1938 — 2024 & 1941 — 2024


Partners in life for sixty-one years, now reunited. Their love story remains an inspiration to all who knew them.

View Full Notice →







### Catherine "Kate" Delgado


July 3, 1969 — October 15, 2024


A passionate nurse and fierce advocate for her patients, remembered for her warmth and unwavering strength.

View Full Notice →







### Arthur P. Simmons


December 1, 1930 — October 2, 2024


A decorated veteran and lifelong Madison resident who served his community with quiet dedication.

View Full Notice →







### Helen F. Nakamura


April 19, 1948 — September 27, 2024


An artist whose watercolors captured the beauty of Upstate New York, leaving a legacy of light and color.

View Full Notice →






View All Obituaries →





These notices are curated by our funeral team with the utmost respect. We welcome you to leave condolences and share memories.




















## Compassionate Funeral Services in Madison


Madison Funeral Home provides dignified, full-service care for families across Madison, NY. From traditional ceremonies to personalized celebrations of life, our dedicated team supports you with warmth, integrity, and attention to every meaningful detail.










### Funeral Planning


Thoughtful guidance through every step of arranging a meaningful service, from venue selection to order of ceremony.











### Casket Selection


A curated collection of finely crafted caskets in wood, metal, and eco-friendly materials, presented with respectful guidance.











### Floral Arrangements


Elegant seasonal florals designed to convey sympathy, love, and remembrance, coordinated seamlessly with your service.











### Candles & Video Tributes


Personalized memorial candles and professionally produced video tributes that celebrate a life beautifully lived.





View All Services






















## Our Locations


Serving families across Madison, NY, and the surrounding communities with compassionate care, wherever you call home.









### Madison Funeral Home


27999 Main Street, Madison, NY 13402


Our primary location offers a full range of services including casket selection, floral arrangements, candle lighting, and video tributes. The funeral team is here to guide you with dignity and warmth.

Get Directions  →








### North Madison Chapel


42 Orchard Lane, Madison, NY 13402


A quiet, intimate space designed for small gatherings and memorial visitations, offering the same trusted care and attention to detail that families have relied on for generations.

Get Directions  →








### Woodside Funeral Home


15 Evergreen Drive, Hamilton, NY 13346


Serving the greater Hamilton area with a dedicated funeral team, this location provides complete funeral services, obituary listings, and personalized memorial planning.

Get Directions  →








### Continuity of Care


From the first call through memorial planning and beyond, our team ensures seamless support across all locations. Every family receives the same compassionate guidance, whether you visit our main funeral home or a neighborhood chapel.

Contact the Nearest Location  →








27999 Main Street, Madison, NY, 13402






## Guided by Compassion, Rooted in Community


Our team at Madison Funeral Home is dedicated to providing gentle, professional guidance when you need it most. We treat every family like our own, honoring life with dignity and warmth.












### Sarah Mitchell


Funeral Director


Providing a steady hand and a listening heart through every step of the arrangement process.











### David Chen


Grief Counselor


Offering compassionate support and resources to help families navigate the journey of loss.











### Eleanor Vance


Community Coordinator


Connecting families with local resources and ensuring every memorial reflects the spirit of Madison.











### Michael Torres


Service Arranger


Meticulously crafting personalized tributes, from floral selections to video memorials.








We are here to answer your questions and provide the support you need, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Let us help you honor a life well-lived.

Get in Touch with Our Team

















Providing compassionate care and dignified services for families in their time of need. We honor every life with grace, respect, and unwavering support.

# Obituaries & Memorials


At Madison Funeral Home, we believe every life tells a story worth honoring. Our obituary notices provide a dignified space for families to share service information, celebrate cherished memories, and offer a lasting tribute to those who have passed. We are here to guide you with compassion through every detail.






"Like a season that gently turns, a life remembered is a life that forever remains."























## Recent Obituaries


Honoring the lives of those we have been privileged to serve at Madison Funeral Home














Featured

### Eleanor M. Whitfield


March 12, 1942 — November 28, 2024


Beloved mother, grandmother, and lifelong Madison resident who dedicated over forty years to teaching at Madison Elementary School. Eleanor's gentle spirit and unwavering kindness touched everyone she met.

Read Full Obituary  →














### Robert J. Callahan


June 5, 1955 — November 22, 2024


Retired firefighter and devoted husband who served the Madison community with courage and compassion for thirty years.

Read Full Obituary  →











### Margaret & Thomas Ainsworth


Margaret: Sept 14, 1948 — Nov 15, 2024 Thomas: Jan 3, 1946 — Nov 18, 2024


Married for fifty-two years, Margaret and Thomas passed peacefully within days of each other, leaving behind a legacy of love.

Read Full Obituary  →











### Patricia L. Nguyen


April 20, 1960 — November 10, 2024


Accomplished nurse and community volunteer whose healing hands and generous heart brought comfort to countless families.

Read Full Obituary  →











### George H. Pendleton


December 8, 1938 — November 5, 2024


Korean War veteran, master carpenter, and storyteller who built not only homes but lasting friendships throughout Madison County.

Read Full Obituary  →








In Loving Memory




### Dorothy F. Simmons


February 18, 1952 — October 28, 2024


Cherished sister and aunt whose love of gardening and baking brought joy to family gatherings for generations.

Read Full Obituary  →











### Michael T. O'Brien


August 30, 1965 — October 20, 2024


Local business owner and Little League coach who mentored hundreds of young athletes with patience and encouragement.

Read Full Obituary  →








In Loving Memory




### Catherine R. Bellamy


July 12, 1940 — October 15, 2024


Devoted parishioner and choir member at St. Mary's whose beautiful soprano voice lifted spirits every Sunday for over fifty years.

Read Full Obituary  →








In Loving Memory




### Frank D. Kowalski


May 3, 1936 — October 8, 2024


Army veteran and lifelong farmer who worked the same land his grandfather settled, passing on a deep respect for the earth.

Read Full Obituary  →








In Loving Memory




### Helen G. Russo


November 22, 1945 — October 1, 2024


Talented seamstress and quilting circle founder whose handcrafted quilts warm homes and hearts across the county.

Read Full Obituary  →








In Loving Memory




### Arthur W. Chen


September 9, 1958 — September 25, 2024


Beloved pharmacist and community health advocate who always had time for a kind word and a listening ear.

Read Full Obituary  →








In Loving Memory




### Lillian M. Foster


January 15, 1932 — September 18, 2024


Great-grandmother of twelve whose Sunday dinners and handwritten letters kept family bonds strong across generations.

Read Full Obituary  →






View All Obituaries  →













## Honoring a Life, Cherishing Every Memory


At Madison Funeral Home, we believe that every life tells a story worth preserving. Through the gentle glow of memorial candles, the timeless beauty of floral tributes, and the heartfelt narrative of video keepsakes, we help families create a lasting legacy of love. Our dedicated funeral team is here to guide you in crafting a service that truly reflects the spirit of your loved one.








### Memorial Candles


A symbol of enduring light and hope, our memorial candles provide a comforting focal point for reflection during visitations and services.







### Floral Tributes


Express sympathy and honor with thoughtfully arranged flowers, from classic standing sprays to personalized casket adornments that celebrate a life in bloom.







### Video Tributes


Capture a lifetime of precious moments with a professionally curated video tribute, weaving together photographs, music, and memories for a deeply personal farewell.














## Obituary & Service Information







At Madison Funeral Home, we understand that an obituary is more than a notice—it is a lasting tribute to a life well lived. Our dedicated funeral team works closely with every family to craft service details, visitation times, and memorial notes with the care and dignity they deserve.









### Carefully Written Tributes


Every obituary is thoughtfully composed to honor the unique story of your loved one, including cherished memories, family names, and meaningful life milestones.










### Complete Service Details


We provide clear, comprehensive information about visitation hours, funeral services, and memorial gatherings so family and friends can plan accordingly.










### Family & Community Support


Our team is available to answer questions, coordinate floral arrangements, candles, and video tributes, and ensure every detail reflects your wishes.










### Online & Local Access


Obituaries are published online and accessible across our Madison, NY locations, helping distant relatives and community members stay informed.






Contact Our Team for Immediate Assistance

Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to support your family.














Providing compassionate care and dignified services for families in their time of need. We honor every life with grace, respect, and unwavering support.

## Personalized Farewells with Care &amp; Grace — Madison Funeral Home

URL: https://example.com/services
Description: Discover tailored funeral services at Madison Funeral Home, including caskets, floral designs, video tributes, and memorial planning. Let our team create a dignified, healing farewell. Explore options now.

Personalized Farewells with Care & Grace — Madison Funeral Home






























Skip to main content















- Home

Contact










# Our Funeral Services


At Madison Funeral Home, we understand that losing a loved one is one of life's most difficult experiences. Our dedicated funeral team is here to guide you with compassion and dignity from the first call through the final remembrance. Whether you are planning ahead or need immediate assistance, we offer a full range of funeral services tailored to honor the unique life of your family member.


From traditional burial services and cremation options to personalized memorials, casket selection, floral arrangements, and video tributes, we provide thoughtful support at every step. Our multiple locations across Madison, NY ensure that families receive the care they need, close to home.


Speak with Our Team




























## Comprehensive Funeral & Memorial Services


At Madison Funeral Home, we guide families through every step of planning a meaningful tribute. Our experienced funeral team provides compassionate support, ensuring each service reflects the unique life and wishes of your loved one.










### Funeral Planning & Coordination


From traditional ceremonies to contemporary celebrations of life, we handle every logistical detail with dignity and care, allowing your family to focus on remembrance and healing.











### Casket Selection & Floral Arrangements


Explore our curated selection of fine caskets and personalized floral tributes. Our staff provides gentle guidance to help you choose arrangements that honor your loved one's spirit and bring comfort to family and friends.











### Video Tributes & Memorial Candles


Celebrate a life beautifully lived with professionally crafted video tributes and personalized memorial candles. These cherished keepsakes offer a lasting way to reflect on precious memories during the service and beyond.











### Family Guidance & Aftercare Support


Our commitment extends beyond the service. We provide ongoing grief resources, assistance with obituaries, and guidance through estate matters, ensuring your family feels supported long after the ceremony concludes.






Speak with Our Team













## Memorial Elements of Grace


Every detail we offer is chosen to honor a life with dignity and warmth. Our curated selection of caskets, floral arrangements, and memorial candles provides families with meaningful ways to express their love and respect.











### Casket Selection


Our collection features handcrafted caskets in rich woods and refined metals, each finished with care. We guide families through every option, ensuring the choice reflects personal taste and cherished memory.


Learn More













### Floral Arrangements


From standing sprays to casket covers, our florists design arrangements that speak the language of remembrance. Seasonal blooms and timeless greenery are composed to bring comfort and beauty to the service.


Learn More













### Memorial Candles


The gentle light of a candle offers a focal point for prayer and reflection. We provide personalized candles and elegant holders that serve as lasting keepsakes for family and friends.


Learn More

















## Video Tributes & Personalized Memorials


At Madison Funeral Home, we believe every life tells a story worth sharing. Our video tribute and personalization services transform cherished memories into a lasting legacy, helping families gather, remember, and find comfort in a uniquely meaningful ceremony.


- Cinematic Video Tributes: Professionally curated video montages set to meaningful music, weaving together photographs and film to honor a life beautifully lived.

- Personalized Remembrance: Custom memorial displays featuring treasured keepsakes, floral arrangements, candles, and personal artifacts that reflect the unique spirit of your loved one.

- Meaningful Ceremony Details: From custom-printed service programs to memorial candles and signature books, every detail is handled with care to create a gathering that truly honors a life.


Arrange a Tribute Consultation


















## Why families choose Madison Funeral Home


For generations, families in Madison, NY have turned to us during their most difficult moments. Our commitment to dignity, compassion, and personalized care forms the foundation of every service we provide.











### Compassionate Guidance


Our dedicated funeral team walks alongside you with empathy and respect, helping you navigate every decision with clarity and care during this tender time.









### Decades of Experience


With deep roots in the Madison community, we bring seasoned expertise to every service — from casket and floral selection to video tributes and memorial candles.









### Locally Trusted


Serving multiple locations throughout Madison, NY, our funeral home has earned the trust of neighbors through consistent, heartfelt service generation after generation.











Contact Us for Guidance

Available 24 hours a day to support your family.













Providing compassionate care and dignified services for families in their time of need. We honor every life with grace, respect, and unwavering support.

# Our Locations & Funeral Team


Rooted in the heart of Madison, NY, Madison Funeral Home is honored to serve families throughout the surrounding communities. Our dedicated funeral team brings compassionate guidance to every step of end-of-life care, ensuring each tribute reflects the life and values of your loved one. From our warm, welcoming locations to the familiar faces you can trust, we are here to provide comfort and support when you need it most.















## Our Locations


Serving Madison and the surrounding communities with dignity and care, our locations provide a comforting space for families to gather, remember, and celebrate life.













27999 Main Street, Madison, NY, 13402


### Madison Funeral Home


Our main location provides comprehensive funeral services including casket selection, floral arrangements, candles, and video tributes. As the heart of our operations, this location ensures that families throughout Madison, NY receive the same compassionate, dignified care regardless of which branch they visit.




27999 Main Street, Madison, NY







Get Directions







### Madison North Chapel


A serene chapel setting ideal for intimate memorial services and family gatherings. Our dedicated funeral team provides personalized support for casket selection, floral arrangements, and memorial candles.




12 Chapel Drive, Madison, NY



Learn More







### Madison South Gathering Center


Designed for larger memorial receptions and community remembrance events, this location offers spacious gathering areas with full audio-visual capabilities for video tributes.




45 Heritage Way, Madison, NY



Learn More







### Madison East Memorial Gardens


A peaceful garden setting adjacent to our funeral home, offering outdoor memorial services and a tranquil space for reflection. Floral arrangements and candle lighting ceremonies are available.




78 Garden Lane, Madison, NY



Learn More

















## Our Funeral Team


At Madison Funeral Home, our dedicated team brings decades of experience and heartfelt compassion to every family we serve. Each member is committed to honoring your loved one with dignity and guiding you through every step with gentle care.









### Michael Stanton


Funeral Director


Guiding families with wisdom and unwavering support.









### Eleanor Vance


Care Coordinator


Ensuring every detail reflects your family's wishes.









### David Chen


Family Support


Providing comfort and resources when you need them most.









### Margaret Wells


Grief Counselor


Walking alongside you on the journey toward healing.















## Our Values & Commitments









### Compassionate Presence


We walk alongside families with gentle guidance, ensuring every detail reflects the life and love of the person being honored. At Madison Funeral Home, compassion is not just a word — it is the foundation of every service we provide.










### Clarity & Guidance


Navigating loss can feel overwhelming. We offer transparent planning, clear communication, and patient support so you can make informed decisions with confidence and peace of mind.










### Honoring Faith & Tradition


Rooted in the Madison community, we respect diverse faith traditions and cultural customs. Whether a traditional funeral service or a contemporary celebration of life, we honor what matters most to your family.





For generations, Madison Funeral Home has been a trusted pillar in Madison, NY — offering dignified funeral services, casket selection, floral arrangements, candles, and video tributes with unwavering care.





















## We Are Here to Guide You


When you need immediate support or wish to plan ahead, the dedicated team at Madison Funeral Home is ready to listen with compassion and provide the guidance your family deserves.


Reach Out for Support












Providing compassionate care and dignified services for families in their time of need. We honor every life with grace, respect, and unwavering support.

# We're Here to Guide You

Reach out anytime — we'll respond with the dignity and respect your family deserves.

## We're Here to Help


At Madison Funeral Home, we understand that reaching out during a time of loss can be difficult. Our dedicated funeral team is available to provide the compassionate guidance and support you need, whenever you need it.









### Compassionate Guidance


Our experienced team provides gentle, personalized support, helping you navigate every decision with care and understanding during this difficult time.








### Local Experience


Rooted in Madison, NY, we have deep ties to our community. We honor local traditions and ensure every service reflects the unique life it celebrates.








### Respectful Support


We treat every family with the utmost dignity and respect, offering a peaceful environment where you can honor your loved one and begin to heal.





Speak With Our Team

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Obituaries
- Services
- Locations & Team



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/5/2026



Madison Funeral Home ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Madison Funeral Home

- Email: buellm900@gmail.com

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: 27999 Main Street, Madison, NY, 13402



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Obituaries
- Services
- Locations & Team



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 5, 2026



Madison Funeral Home is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Madison Funeral Home

- Email: buellm900@gmail.com

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Providing compassionate care and dignified services for families in their time of need. We honor every life with grace, respect, and unwavering support.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Obituaries
- Services
- Locations & Team



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 5, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Madison Funeral Home

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Funeral Services provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Madison Funeral Home provides Funeral Services through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Madison Funeral Home. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties
